evidence.source_title: IRGC Appoints Ali Abdollahi as New Commander of Khatam al-Anbiya Headquarters
evidence.description: Aliabadi ultimately succeeded both Rashid and Shadmani as KCHQ commander; his exact relationship to Rashid during Rashid's tenure is not fully documented.

editorial_notes: Connection inferred from succession chain. Aliabadi's role before becoming full KCHQ commander in September 2025 is not fully documented.
